Example

Enum PatientOrientation

Namespace
VMS.TPS.Common.Model.Types
Assembly
VMS.TPS.Common.Model.Types.dll

The enumeration of patient orientations.

public enum PatientOrientation

Fields

FeetFirstDecubitusLeft = 8

Feet first - decubitus left.

FeetFirstDecubitusRight = 7

Feet first - decubitus right.

FeetFirstProne = 6

Feet first - prone.

FeetFirstSupine = 5

Feet first - supine.

HeadFirstDecubitusLeft = 4

Head first - decubitus left.

HeadFirstDecubitusRight = 3

Head first - decubitus right.

HeadFirstProne = 2

Head first - prone.

HeadFirstSupine = 1

Head first - supine.

NoOrientation = 0

No orientation.

Sitting = 9

Sitting.
